subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Verily, the multitudes are enchanted by the tongue of truth and intoxicated with the wine of love. Yet when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طالب حقیقتا جمهور ناس بزبان مفتون حقیقتند و مخمور باده محبت ولی چون میدان
subcodes.subjects: @condition of search, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
